---
title: "Bayesian Subgroup Analysis & Sensitivity Pipeline"
output: html_document
---

# 1. Package Installation and Setup
```{r setup, message=FALSE, warning=FALSE}
if (!require("devtools")) install.packages("devtools")
if (!require("pacman")) install.packages("pacman")
if (!require("readxl")) install.packages("readxl")
if (!require("rstudioapi")) install.packages("rstudioapi")

# Ensure Arthur Albuquerque's prior tool is installed
if (!require("BayesianPriorsTool")) {
  devtools::install_github("arthur-albuquerque/BayesianPriorsTool")
}

other_packages <- c("bayesmeta", "BayesianPriorsTool", "dplyr", "tidyr", 
                    "metafor", "ggdist", "ggplot2", "patchwork", "gt", "readxl", "rstudioapi")

# Ensure meta v7.0-0 is used to maintain compatibility with metaadd/metabind layout
meta_version <- if (requireNamespace("meta", quietly = TRUE)) packageVersion("meta") else "0.0-0"
if (meta_version != "7.0-0") {
  remotes::install_version("meta", "7.0-0", upgrade = "never")
}
pacman::p_load(char = c("meta", other_packages))

# Set universal ggplot theme
theme_set(
  theme(
    plot.title.position = 'plot',
    axis.ticks.x = element_blank(),
    axis.ticks.y = element_blank(),
    axis.text.x = element_text(size = 12),
    axis.text.y = element_text(size = 12),
    axis.title.x = element_text(size = 14),
    panel.background = element_blank(),
    panel.grid.major.x = element_line(color = "gray80", linewidth = 0.3)
  )
)

```

# 2. UI & Outcome Configuration

```{r config}
library(rstudioapi)

output_dir <- selectDirectory(caption = "Select Output Directory")
active_outcome_key = "recur"  # Options: "mrs_0_2", "mortality", "recur"

outcome_config <- switch(active_outcome_key,
  "recur" = list(
    name = "Hematoma recurrence",
    turner_prior = "adverse events",
    direction = "less",
    enthusiastic_mean = -0.7,
    favors_left = "Favors MMAE",
    favors_right = "Favors SOC"
  ),
  "mrs_0_2" = list(
    name = "Functional Independence (mRS 0-2)",
    turner_prior = "quality of life / functioning (dichotomized)",
    direction = "greater",
    enthusiastic_mean = 0.7,
    favors_left = "Favors SOC",
    favors_right = "Favors MMAE"
  ),
  "mortality" = list(
    name = "90-Day Mortality",
    turner_prior = "all-cause mortality",
    direction = "less",
    enthusiastic_mean = -0.7,
    favors_left = "Favors MMAE",
    favors_right = "Favors SOC"
  )
)

active_outcome_name <- outcome_config$name
active_turner_category <- outcome_config$turner_prior

```

# 3. Data Loading & Prior Parameter Extraction

```{r data_loading}
myfile <- selectFile(caption = "Choose data Excel file")
sheet_names <- excel_sheets(myfile)
  
ma <- lapply(sheet_names, function(x) { as.data.frame(read_excel(myfile, sheet = x)) })
names(ma) <- sheet_names

data_active <- ma[[active_outcome_key]]

# Fetch empirical Turner prior parameters
tau_prior_obj <- TurnerEtAlPrior(
  outcome = active_turner_category,
  comparator1 = "non-pharmacological",
  comparator2 = "placebo / control"
)

extracted_tau_mean <- tau_prior_obj$parameters["tau", "mu"]
extracted_tau_sd <- tau_prior_obj$parameters["tau", "sigma"]

```

# 4. Master Analysis & Plotting Pipeline Function

```{r pipeline_definition}
run_bayesian_subgroup <- function(data, outcome_name, output_dir, prior_tau_mean, prior_tau_sd, config) {
  
  message(paste0("\n--- Processing Outcome: ", outcome_name, " ---"))
  
  # Calculate Effect Sizes (Log Odds Ratio)
  dat_OR <- escalc(measure = "OR",
                   ai = event.e, n1i = n.e, 
                   ci = event.c, n2i = n.c,
                   slab = author, data = data) |> data.frame()
                   
  dat_OR$sei <- sqrt(dat_OR$vi)
  
  # Data Cleaning & Factor Level Matching
  dat_OR$Subgroup <- factor(dat_OR$Subgroup, levels = c("Microspheres", "Liquid"))
  dat_OR <- dat_OR[!is.na(dat_OR$Subgroup) & !is.na(dat_OR$yi) & !is.na(dat_OR$sei), ]
  
  if(nrow(dat_OR) == 0) {
    stop("ERROR: All rows were dropped. Check spelling of your subgroup levels in Excel.")
  }
  
  matrix_subgroups <- stats::model.matrix(~Subgroup, data = dat_OR)
  
  # --- CONSTANT EFFECT PRIORS  ---
  prior_sub0_mean <- 0
  prior_sub0_sd   <- 0.5   
  prior_beta_mean <- 0
  prior_beta_sd   <- 0.82  # Weakly informative subgroup difference prior
  
  # --- HETEROGENEITY (TAU) PRIORS ---
  # 1. Primary Analysis: Turner Log-Normal Prior
  primary_tau_prior <- function(t) {
    ifelse(t <= 0, 0, dlnorm(t, meanlog = prior_tau_mean, sdlog = prior_tau_sd))
  }
  
  # 2. Sensitivity 1: Half-Cauchy Prior (Scale = 0.5)
  half_cauchy_tau_prior <- function(t) {
    ifelse(t <= 0, 0, 2 * dcauchy(t, location = 0, scale = 0.5))
  }
  
  # 3. Sensitivity 2: Enthusiastic Prior for Tau (Assumes very low/minimal heterogeneity)
  enthusiastic_tau_prior <- function(t) {
    ifelse(t <= 0, 0, dexp(t, rate = 2))
  }
  
  # 5. Fit Models (Main + 2 Sensitivity Models) -----------------------------
  
  # Model A: Primary Analysis Model (Turner Log-Normal Tau)
  subgroup_model_main <- bmr(y = dat_OR$yi, sigma = dat_OR$sei, 
                             labels = dat_OR$author, X = matrix_subgroups,
                             beta.prior.mean = c(prior_sub0_mean, prior_beta_mean), 
                             beta.prior.sd = c(prior_sub0_sd, prior_beta_sd),
                             tau.prior = primary_tau_prior)
  
  # Model B: Sensitivity Analysis 1 (Half-Cauchy Prior for Heterogeneity Tau)
  subgroup_model_hc <- bmr(y = dat_OR$yi, sigma = dat_OR$sei, 
                            labels = dat_OR$author, X = matrix_subgroups,
                            beta.prior.mean = c(prior_sub0_mean, prior_beta_mean), 
                            beta.prior.sd = c(prior_sub0_sd, prior_beta_sd),
                            tau.prior = half_cauchy_tau_prior)
  
  # Model C: Sensitivity Analysis 2 (Enthusiastic Prior for Heterogeneity Tau)
  subgroup_model_enth <- bmr(y = dat_OR$yi, sigma = dat_OR$sei, 
                             labels = dat_OR$author, X = matrix_subgroups,
                             beta.prior.mean = c(prior_sub0_mean, prior_beta_mean), 
                             beta.prior.sd = c(prior_sub0_sd, prior_beta_sd),
                             tau.prior = enthusiastic_tau_prior)
  
  # Baseline Overall Model (No Moderator Subgroup)
  overall_model <- bayesmeta(y = dat_OR$yi, sigma = dat_OR$sei, 
                             labels = dat_OR$author,
                             mu.prior.mean = prior_sub0_mean, 
                             mu.prior.sd = prior_sub0_sd,
                             tau.prior = primary_tau_prior)

  # 6.Sampling and Statistics Extraction -----------------------------
  set.seed(123)
  
  extract_subgroup_estimates <- function(model) {
    samples <- model$rposterior(n = 10000, tau.sample = FALSE) |> data.frame()
    df_sub <- data.frame(
      Microspheres = samples$X.Intercept.,
      Liquid = samples$X.Intercept. + samples$SubgroupLiquid
    )
    return(df_sub)
  }
  
  samples_main_df <- extract_subgroup_estimates(subgroup_model_main)
  samples_hc_df   <- extract_subgroup_estimates(subgroup_model_hc)
  samples_enth_df <- extract_subgroup_estimates(subgroup_model_enth)
  overall_samples <- overall_model$rposterior(n = 10000, tau.sample = FALSE)
  
  # Compute statistical points using valid ggdist variables (y, ymin, ymax)
  get_stats <- function(vector_data) {
    hdi_intervals <- mean_hdi(vector_data)
    list(mean = hdi_intervals$y, lower = hdi_intervals$ymin, upper = hdi_intervals$ymax)
  }
  
  m_stats <- get_stats(samples_main_df$Microspheres)
  l_stats <- get_stats(samples_main_df$Liquid)
  
  hc_m_stats <- get_stats(samples_hc_df$Microspheres)
  hc_l_stats <- get_stats(samples_hc_df$Liquid)
  
  enth_m_stats <- get_stats(samples_enth_df$Microspheres)
  enth_l_stats <- get_stats(samples_enth_df$Liquid)

  # Export Model summaries text file
  sink(file.path(output_dir, paste0("1_Model_Summaries_", gsub(" ", "_", outcome_name), ".txt")))
  cat("====================================================================\n")
  cat("Bayesian Subgroup Meta-Regression Summaries: ", outcome_name, "\n")
  cat("====================================================================\n\n")
  cat("--- PRIMARY ANALYSIS MODEL (Turner Log-Normal Tau) ---\n")
  print(subgroup_model_main$summary)
  cat("\n\n--- SENSITIVITY ANALYSIS 1: HALF-CAUCHY TAU ---\n")
  print(subgroup_model_hc$summary)
  cat("\n\n--- SENSITIVITY ANALYSIS 2: ENTHUSIASTIC TAU ---\n")
  print(subgroup_model_enth$summary)
  sink()

  # 7. Generate and Export Publication-Ready Plots ---------------------------
  
  forest_data_no_subgroup <- metabin(data = dat_OR, studlab = author,
                                     common = FALSE, random = FALSE,
                                     event.e = event.e, n.e = n.e,
                                     event.c = event.c, n.c = n.c, sm = "OR")
  
  # --- SUBGROUP 0 (MICROSPHERES) SENSITIVITY FOREST PLOT ---
  sub0_p1 <- metaadd(forest_data_no_subgroup, type = "random", TE = m_stats$mean, lower = m_stats$lower, upper = m_stats$upper)
  sub0_p2 <- metaadd(forest_data_no_subgroup, type = "random", TE = hc_m_stats$mean, lower = hc_m_stats$lower, upper = hc_m_stats$upper)
  sub0_p3 <- metaadd(forest_data_no_subgroup, type = "random", TE = enth_m_stats$mean, lower = enth_m_stats$lower, upper = enth_m_stats$upper)
  
  bind_sub0 <- metabind(sub0_p1, sub0_p2, sub0_p3, 
                        name = c("Primary Analysis (Log-Normal Tau)", 
                                 "Sensitivity 1 (Half-Cauchy Tau)", 
                                 "Sensitivity 2 (Enthusiastic Tau)"))
  
  png(file.path(output_dir, paste0("3_Sensitivity_Forest_Microspheres_", gsub(" ", "_", outcome_name), ".png")), width = 3200, height = 2200, res = 300)
  forest(bind_sub0, smlab = "Microspheres Subgroup Sensitivity", leftcols = "studlab", rightcols = c("effect", "ci"))
  dev.off()
  
  # --- SUBGROUP 1 (LIQUID) SENSITIVITY FOREST PLOT ---
  sub1_p1 <- metaadd(forest_data_no_subgroup, type = "random", TE = l_stats$mean, lower = l_stats$lower, upper = l_stats$upper)
  sub1_p2 <- metaadd(forest_data_no_subgroup, type = "random", TE = hc_l_stats$mean, lower = hc_l_stats$lower, upper = hc_l_stats$upper)
  sub1_p3 <- metaadd(forest_data_no_subgroup, type = "random", TE = enth_l_stats$mean, lower = enth_l_stats$lower, upper = enth_l_stats$upper)
  
  bind_sub1 <- metabind(sub1_p1, sub1_p2, sub1_p3, 
                        name = c("Primary Analysis (Log-Normal Tau)", 
                                 "Sensitivity 1 (Half-Cauchy Tau)", 
                                 "Sensitivity 2 (Enthusiastic Tau)"))
  
  png(file.path(output_dir, paste0("4_Sensitivity_Forest_Liquid_", gsub(" ", "_", outcome_name), ".png")), width = 3200, height = 2200, res = 300)
  forest(bind_sub1, smlab = "Liquid Subgroup Sensitivity", leftcols = "studlab", rightcols = c("effect", "ci"))
  dev.off()
  
  # --- SUBGROUP DIFFERENCE (BETA DIST) PLOT ---
  prob_lower_beta  <- mean(subgroup_model_main$rposterior(n = 10000)[, "SubgroupLiquid"] < log(1))
  prob_upper_beta  <- 1 - prob_lower_beta
  shade_lower_beta <- prob_lower_beta >= prob_upper_beta
  chosen_prob_pct  <- round(max(prob_lower_beta, prob_upper_beta) * 100, 1)
  beta_samples     <- data.frame(Beta = subgroup_model_main$rposterior(n = 10000)[, "SubgroupLiquid"])
  
  p_beta <- ggplot(beta_samples, aes(x = Beta, fill = after_stat(if (shade_lower_beta) x < log(1) else x > log(1)))) +
    stat_slab() +
    scale_fill_manual(values = c("gray90", "forestgreen")) +
    geom_vline(xintercept = log(1), linetype = 2) +
    annotate("text", x = quantile(beta_samples$Beta, if (shade_lower_beta) 0.05 else 0.95), y = 0.3, size = 6, label = paste0(chosen_prob_pct, "%")) +
    scale_x_continuous(breaks = log(c(0.1, 0.2, 0.5, 1, 2, 5, 10)), labels = function(x) round(exp(x), 2)) +
    coord_cartesian(x = log(c(0.1, 10))) +
    labs(x = "\nRatio of Odds Ratios (log scale)", y = "Density", title = paste0("Subgroup Difference (Liquid vs Microspheres): ", outcome_name)) +
    theme(axis.text.y = element_blank(), legend.position = "none")
  
  png(file.path(output_dir, paste0("2_Subgroup_Difference_", gsub(" ", "_", outcome_name), ".png")), width = 3000, height = 2500, res = 300)
  print(p_beta)
  dev.off()
  
  # --- COMBINED DENSITY & PROBABILITY PLOT ---
  subgroup_overall_samples <- samples_main_df |> mutate(Overall = overall_samples) |> pivot_longer(everything()) |> 
    mutate(name = factor(name, levels = c("Microspheres", "Liquid", "Overall")))
  
  p_density <- ggplot(subgroup_overall_samples, aes(x = value, fill = name)) +
    stat_halfeye(.width = 0.95, point_interval = mean_hdi) +
    scale_fill_manual(values = c("#EECE9C", "#BE6376", "#605A91")) +
    scale_x_continuous(breaks = log(c(0.1, 0.25, 0.5, 0.75, 1, 1.5, 2)), labels = function(x) round(exp(x), 2)) +
    coord_cartesian(x = log(c(0.1, 2))) +
    labs(x = "\nOdds Ratio (log scale)", y = " ") +
    facet_wrap(~name, ncol = 1) +
    theme(axis.text.y = element_blank(), legend.position = "none", strip.text.x = element_text(size = 12))
  
  p_prob <- ggplot(subgroup_overall_samples, aes(exp(value), colour = name)) +
    geom_line(aes(y = after_stat(y)), stat = 'ecdf', linewidth = 1.2) +
    scale_color_manual(' ', values = c("#EECE9C", "#BE6376", "#605A91")) +
    scale_x_continuous(breaks = seq(0, 2, 0.25)) +
    coord_cartesian(x = c(0, 2)) +
    labs(x = "\nOdds Ratio", y = expression("Probability OR" <= "X")) +
    theme(panel.grid.major.y = element_line(color = "gray80", linewidth = 0.3), legend.position = "bottom")
  
  p_combined <- p_density + p_prob + plot_layout(ncol = 2)
  
  png(file.path(output_dir, paste0("5_Overall_Effect_Density_", gsub(" ", "_", outcome_name), ".png")), width = 3000, height = 2500, res = 300)
  print(p_combined)
  dev.off()
  
  message(paste0("Pipeline successfully finalized for: ", outcome_name))
}

```

# 5. Pipeline Execution

```{r execution}
run_bayesian_subgroup(
  data = data_active,
  outcome_name = active_outcome_name,
  output_dir = output_dir,
  prior_tau_mean = extracted_tau_mean,
  prior_tau_sd = extracted_tau_sd,
  config = outcome_config
)

```
